title: mercurialis huetii
intro: Mercurialis huetii, also known as Huet's Spurge or Small Spurge, is a perennial herb in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Mercurialis huetii typically involve making a tea from the leaves or roots, which can also be used in ointments and salves to treat skin conditions and wounds.
